example: The medication proved to be inefficacious in alleviating the patient's symptoms, leading to the exploration of alternative treatments.
The company's abortive attempt to launch a new product resulted in financial loss.
The region remained largely unprosperous despite efforts to stimulate economic growth.
The ill-fated expedition to the Arctic ended tragically when the explorers became stranded in a snowstorm.
The bungled attempt to repair the plumbing led to a flooded basement, causing extensive damage to the property.
Despite her unavailing attempts to convince him to stay, he decided to leave the company.
The neglected garden was languishing, with weeds overtaking the once beautiful flower beds.
The foiled bank robbery ended with the apprehension of the suspects before they could escape with the stolen money.
Modern society is destitute of genuine community bonds.
The penurious family struggled to afford even the basic necessities of life.
Despite working full-time, the family lived a hand-to-mouth existence, struggling to cover basic expenses like rent and groceries.
The indigent population relied on government assistance for survival.
As a student, he led an impecunious existence, relying on part-time jobs to make ends meet.
The downtrodden workers protested against unjust working conditions.
His attempt to prank his friend backfired when she turned the tables on him.
The beggarly man sat in a corner, holding onto his old coat to stay warm.
The contractor bungled the construction project, leading to numerous structural issues and delays.
The highly anticipated product launch fizzled when technical issues caused a delay and reduced consumer interest.
The once-promising startup began to languish after losing its major investor and failing to secure additional funding.
After years of struggling to compete in the market, the small bookstore had to fold.
The company's stock price dropped after it continued to underperform in the market.
For the sake of the team, she chose to relinquish her leadership role.
The marketing campaign turned out to be a misfire, generating little interest in the new product.
